pdn.desc: Proposed development consists of a 28-storey residential building with a total of 319 residential units, 184 parking spaces and 248 bicycle parking spaces, contained within four underground parking levels that are internal to the building. The development has a total gross floor area of 24,644 square metres.

This site plan application proposes amendments to the previously approved site plan control application to permit two 24-storey residential apartment buildings connected by a podium.  The application proposes an increase in the overall number of residential units from 459 to 520. The increase in residential dwelling units would be accommodated in the proposed east 24-storey building.

To construct a 10-storey mixed-use building (including a mezzanine level) with commercial at grade. The development would have a gross floor area of 9912 m², of which 230 m² would be non-residential gross floor area. The P4 level of the proposal has been reduced to reflect revised parking ratios which result in 121 spaces reduced from the previously proposed 141 parking spaces.  The above grade portion of the building has remained the same.The Zoning By-law Amendment Application was approved at LPAT (Case No. PL180191) in part pending the finalization of the draft zoning by-laws and other Divisional Conditions as per Attachment 2 of LPAT Decision on June 4, 2020.

Phase 3 of IQ development consisting of 915 units housed in three towers connected via a three-storey podium. The towers are proposed at 19, 26 and 42 storeys. A total of 773 parking spaces are proposed. A 284 square metre Community Space is also proposed at-grade.
